The Adendrobium orchid, a type of orchid, is a species of flowering plant. It is used in traditional medicine and is believed to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.

The bioactive constituents of Adendrobium include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
